name: Growthpoint Properties Australia
analysis: GOZ's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.2900, stop A$2.1087, target A$2.8339 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
